login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your eco journey

register.title: Join EcoTrack
register.subtitle: Start your sustainable journey today
register.successText: We sent a verification link to your inbox. Open it to activate your account.
register.successExpiry: Confirm your email within {{time}} — the link expires in 15 minutes.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
forgotPassword.successText: We've sent a password reset link to {{email}}. Please check your inbox.

verify.wait: Please wait while we confirm your address
verify.successSubtitle: Welcome to EcoTrack. Your account is ready to go.
verify.successNote: Start tracking your eco-actions and grow your impact!
verify.errorNote: The link may have expired or already been used. Register again to receive a new verification email.

resetPassword.tokenMissing: Reset token is missing from the URL
resetPassword.successText: Your password has been updated successfully.
resetPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.subtitle: Ready to make a positive impact today?
dashboard.takeTestPrompt: Take the eco footprint test to discover your environmental impact
dashboard.noActivityHint: Complete eco actions to see your progress here!
dashboard.noStreak: Complete eco actions to start your streak!
dashboard.achievementsDesc: Unlock badges by completing eco actions
dashboard.retakeDisabled: You can retake the test once a month

ecoActions.title: Eco Actions
ecoActions.subtitle: Complete daily actions to earn points and level up!
ecoActions.resetNote: Each action can be completed once per day. All actions reset at midnight (00:00) — come back tomorrow to earn more points!

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: See how you rank among eco warriors worldwide
leaderboard.empty: No users on the leaderboard yet. Be the first to complete eco actions!

profile.noActivityHint: Complete eco actions to see your journey here!

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.subtitle: Update your personal information
editProfile.photoHint: JPG, PNG or WEBP. Max size 5MB.
editProfile.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
editProfile.confirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data from our servers.

feed.title: Eco News Feed
feed.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest environmental news
feed.noNewsSource: No articles found for this source. Try selecting a different source.
feed.noNewsDefault: Check back later for the latest environmental news.

ecoTest.title: Eco Footprint Test
ecoTest.subtitle: Discover your environmental impact and get personalized tips
ecoTest.question: Question {{current}} of {{total}}

home.heroSubtitle: Join thousands of eco warriors making a positive impact on our planet
home.feature1Desc: Take sustainable actions like recycling, planting trees, and reducing waste
home.feature2Desc: Gain points for each action and climb through leagues as you progress
home.feature3Desc: Connect with like-minded individuals and inspire others to go green
home.ctaSubtitle: Start your eco journey today and be part of the change

placeholder.comingSoon: This feature is coming soon! Stay tuned for updates.

map.title: Eco Map
map.description: Find eco-friendly locations and activities near you

about.title: About EcoTrack
about.description: Learn more about our mission to promote sustainability

zeroWaste.name: Zero Waste Almaty
zeroWaste.description: Reducing household waste to zero through mindful consumption and recycling.

cleanAir.name: Clean Air Initiative
cleanAir.description: Fighting air pollution in Almaty through awareness and eco-friendly transport.

treePlanters.name: Urban Tree Planters
treePlanters.description: Planting trees across the city to improve the urban green cover.

waterSavers.name: Water Savers
waterSavers.description: Promoting water conservation habits in everyday life.

renewable.name: Renewable Energy Club
renewable.description: Advocates for solar, wind, and other renewable energy sources in Kazakhstan.

lifestyle.name: Eco Lifestyle
lifestyle.description: Sharing tips and habits for a more sustainable everyday lifestyle.

friends.title: Friends
friends.subtitle: Connect with other eco warriors
friends.noFriends: No friends yet. Send a request to get started!

map.title: Eco Map of Almaty
map.subtitle: Real recycling and waste collection points from OpenStreetMap
